title: rumohra simplicior var. major
intro: Rumohra simplicior var. major, commonly known as the False Fern or Lady Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and inflammation. The health benefits of Rumohra simplicior var. major include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, and can also be dried and used as a powder or extract.
